title: Cashback Credit Card
description: Get up to 5% cashback on all spends with no annual fee.
mainContent:
#### Up to 5% cashback
##### on all spends

#### Free for life
##### No annual fees

## AED 500 Welcome Bonus
**For new credit card customers:** AED 500 Welcome Bonus on the card when you spend AED 5,000 or more in the first 2 months post card issuance.
**For existing credit card customers:** AED 100 Welcome Bonus on the card when you spend AED 5,000 or more in the first 2 months post card issuance.

For T&Cs please [click here](https://www.mashreq.com/-/jssmedia/pdfs/neo/cards/welcome-offer-tnc-eng.ashx).

## Earn Cashback on your purchases
5% cashback on international and local dining spends, 1% cashback on other international spends, up to 1% cashback on local spends, and 0.33% cashback for government payments and utilities. Cashback is not applicable on bill payments made via Mashreq Online and Mobile Banking App.

### Get Instant Credit Card
[Apply Now](https://digital.mashreqbank.com/creditcards/ntb/otp-send?utm_pname=cashback&utm_pcode=SPC92&utm_source=Website&utm_medium=CashbackPage)

###### 20% cashback for the first 4 months on Netflix, Talabat, Careem and more. Max. cashback of AED 50 per merchant per month. [T&C's](https://www.mashreq.com/-/jssmedia/pdfs/neo/cards/Acquisition_Offer_2020_TnC_EN.ashx).

### Offers
**50% discount at Cinepolis** - 50% off on Deluxe-Plus seats. T&Cs [here](https://www.mashreq.com/-/jssmedia/pdfs/campaigns/Mashreq-Cinepolis-Cinemas-eng.ashx).
**Travel Easy** - Discover a host of travel offers which offer peace of mind. [More info](https://www.mashreq.com/en/uae/neo/offers/?payment=traveleasy).
**Easy Payment Plan** - Enjoy shopping and buy now, pay later. [Details](https://www.mashreq.com/en/uae/neo/offers/?payment=easypaymentplan).

### No Hidden Fees
- Primary Card: No annual fees
- Up to 57 days interest-free period.

### Transparency
**Cashback Card Terms & Conditions** - [More info](https://www.mashreq.com/-/jssmedia/pdfs/neo/cards/KFS-TnC/Mashreq-Cashback-Card-tnc-new-en.ashx).
**General Terms & Conditions** - [View here](https://www.mashreq.com/-/jssmedia/pdfs/neo/cards/migrated/GeneralTermsandConditionsforCreditCards.ashx).

20% cashback for the first 4 months on Netflix, Talabat, Careem and more. Max. cashback of AED 50 per merchant per month.

Annual fees Primary Card: No annual fees Supplementary Card: No annual fees Interest free period Up to 57 days Monthly Minimum Payment 5% of your monthly statement balance Pay Protect Insurance 0.99% of your monthly statement balance ( + 5% VAT)
